qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Nesting depth constraint bypass in UTF8DataInputJsonParser allows unbounded JSON parsing
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same Jackson Core 3.x DataInput parsing path and same missing maxNestingDepth enforcement in UTF8DataInputJsonParser as the advisory-described root cause.

selected_finding.title: Nesting depth constraint bypass in UTF8DataInputJsonParser allows unbounded JSON parsing

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding identifies the advisory root cause: UTF8DataInputJsonParser uses the DataInput parser path without enforcing StreamReadConstraints.maxNestingDepth. The fresh copied PoC reached that vulnerable path and showed the configured nesting-depth guard being bypassed, but it stopped after proving the bypass and did not demonstrate a crash, hang, OutOfMemoryError, StackOverflowError, or measured resource exhaustion.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-6v53-7c9g-w56r describes tools.jackson.core:jackson-core 3.0.x UTF8DataInputJsonParser bypassing StreamReadConstraints.maxNestingDepth for java.io.DataInput sources.

nesting_depth_bypass_datainput/vulnerability_report.json names JsonFactory.createParser(ObjectReadContext, DataInput), UTF8DataInputJsonParser.nextToken(), and UTF8DataInputJsonParser._nextTokenNotInObject() as the vulnerable path and describes direct child-context creation bypassing validateNestingDepth().
.judge/poc_runs/nesting_depth_bypass_datainput/run.log shows the InputStream control parser threw StreamConstraintsException at nesting depth 11 with maxNestingDepth=10.

.judge/poc_runs/nesting_depth_bypass_datainput/run.log shows the DataInput parser completed parsing 4001 tokens from a 2000-level nested JSON document without enforcing maxNestingDepth and emitted EVOHUNT_PROOF_SIGNAL:NESTING_DEPTH_BYPASS_CONFIRMED.
blockers_to_higher_tier: The executed PoC did not produce a denial-of-service runtime effect such as StackOverflowError, OutOfMemoryError, process crash, hang, timeout, or measurable resource exhaustion attributable to the advisory root cause.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC confirmed the advisory parser behavior: InputStream parsing enforced maxNestingDepth=10 by throwing StreamConstraintsException at depth 11, while DataInput parsing accepted a 2000-level nested document and parsed 4001 tokens without enforcing the configured limit. No DoS effect was observed.
